faqs.question: Why are drain flies so common in Far Rockaway homes?
faqs.answer: Far Rockaway's coastal location creates naturally humid conditions that drain flies thrive in. The moisture from ocean air, combined with older plumbing systems in many beachside properties, creates ideal breeding grounds in drains, sump pumps, and basement areas. Our treatment addresses both the flies and the moisture sources.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Far Rockaway?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Far Rockaway take 1-2 hours depending on property size and infestation severity. Our technicians inspect all drains, apply bio-enzymatic treatments to eliminate larvae, and treat breeding sites. You'll see significant reduction within 48 hours, with complete elimination typically within 7-10 days.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 drain fly treatment service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a complete property inspection, identification of all breeding sites, bio-enzymatic drain treatments, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, fly elimination, and preventive recommendations. The price varies based on property size, number of drains affected, and severity of infestation. We provide upfront pricing before starting work.

faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency drain fly treatment services throughout Far Rockaway, Queens.
